_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting exploratory data analysis, including distributional analysis, correlation analysis, anomaly detection, and translating EDA findings into modeling decisions.
comments: NICE skill intersects with WIDAI AI domain. Skill AI-S-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-S-006 (DQ, cosine: 0.604), LS-S-009 (LS, cosine: 0.595).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.5/10 (raw 0.647). Shared vocabulary: [analysis, data, skill]. NICE-only terms [performing] vs WIDAI-only terms [anomaly, conducting, correlation, decisions, detection, distributional] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.909 (P=0.953, R=0.870). P exceeds R by 0.083 — the NICE element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Skill in performing data analysis" and "Skill in conducting exploratory data analysis, including distributional analysis" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.668 ≈ STS 0.647 (gap 0.021). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [analysis, data, skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 21.1%. Shared tokens: [analysis, data, skill]. NICE-only: [performing]. WIDAI-only: [anomaly, conducting, correlation, decisions, detection, distributional].
